subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! We have heard thy call and have answered thee with a Tablet that beareth witness unto that which God Himself did testify before existence came to be, that there is no God but [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم سمعنا ندآئک اجبناک بلوح شهد بما شهد الله قبل الوجود انه لا اله الا
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
